---
title: "Jane Martin"
---

## Jane Martin

**Dates:** (b.1836/7)

### Description

pupil at Otterbourne School

### Biography

Daughter of James Martin, agricultural labourer, of Otterbourne; by the time of the 1861 census she was kitchenmaid to Countess Nelson at Landford House.

### Letters

- Letter from October 29 [1849]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
